latestRun.summary:
MODE: self_audit_slack_only. HARD STOP FOR EMAIL: never send email in this job. Produce daily self-audit report including cron status, permanent rules/guardrails, health snapshot, drift/contradictions, and corrective actions. Send it via centralized notifier API:
python3 /home/ubuntu/.openclaw/workspace/scripts/slack_notify.py --title "Daily self-audit" --text "<AUDIT_TEXT>"
Never NO_REPLY.

If any email section is relevant, report findings in Slack text only; do not send mail.

Daily self-audit for Jon (permanent, send every run): produce a thorough doctor-style report and EMAIL it to jon@silverpine.com (not Slack). Include: (1) current scheduled cron jobs (name, id, schedule, enabled, next run, last status), (2) permanent rules/guardrails currently in effect, (3) system health snapshot, (4) configuration drift/contradictions, (5) corrective actions in last 24h + recommended fixes. Use allowlisted email sending. If email send fails, immediately notify Jon in Slack with failure reason.
